seoTitle: How to Add Price and Score Calculations in Typeform
metaDescription: Learn how to assign values to answers in Typeform to automatically calculate prices, totals, or quiz scores based on responses.
intro: Manually calculating totals or quiz scores from form responses is slow and error-prone. This guide covers how to use Typeform's built-in calculation features to assign values to answer choices and automatically compute prices, totals, or scores as respondents complete the form.

steps.heading: Enable price and score calculations
steps.body: Turn on the calculation feature for your form so you can start assigning values to individual answer choices.

steps.heading: Assign values to answers
steps.body: Set a numeric value for each relevant answer choice, whether it represents a price, a quiz point value, or another custom metric.

steps.heading: Configure calculation rules
steps.body: Set up how the assigned values should combine, such as summing them into a total price or a final quiz score.

steps.heading: Test and publish your form
steps.body: Run through the form with different answer combinations to confirm calculations produce the expected results before publishing.

faq.question: Can I use calculations for both pricing and quiz scoring?
faq.answer: Yes, the same calculation feature can be used to total prices for order forms or calculate scores for quizzes, depending on how you assign values.

faq.question: Can calculations combine with logic?
faq.answer: Yes, calculations can work alongside logic and variables to display personalized outcomes based on a respondent's answers.

faq.question: Do respondents see the calculated total in real time?
faq.answer: Depending on your setup, you can display running totals or a final result to respondents as they complete the form.

faq.question: Is this useful for ecommerce order forms?
faq.answer: Yes, this feature is commonly used by ecommerce sellers to build order forms with automatic price totals based on selected options.
